summary: G.2.1 Terminology Rename Testing Complete - 16/16 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Verified new terminology (bank_loan/own_funds/combined, bucket=own) works correctly. Fixed bug in AdminDeals.jsx (non_bank_stages → own_stages).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AdminDeals.jsx line 179 used 'd.non_bank_stages' instead of 'd.own_stages' - progress bar calculation was broken for migrated deals
Backend migration (rename_payment_terminology) ran successfully on boot - migrated 5 deals
Migration marker 'g2_1_rename_payment_terminology' correctly stored in _migrations collection

All new testids verified: pm-radio-bank_loan, pm-radio-own_funds, pm-radio-combined, pm-bank-section, pm-own-section, pm-combined-breakdown, schedule-section-own, schedule-section-bank, stage-amount-{bucket}-{order}
No old testids found (pm-radio-with_bank, pm-radio-without_bank, schedule-section-non_bank)
PAYMENT_MODE_LABELS correctly shows: Банков кредит, Лични средства, Комбиниран
Schedule sections correctly titled: 'Вноски — Лични средства' and 'Вноски — Банков кредит'
Schedule has NO editable % column - only Сума column with '(X% от basis)' info text below
Auto-generate creates 8 stages for own bucket (standard preset), 4 stages for bank bucket (with_bank preset)
suggest-distribution endpoint works correctly for all field combinations
Quote→Deal conversion creates deal with payment_mode='own_funds' and imports schedule into own_stages
seed_data_creation: Created test deals during backend tests (cleaned up). Created D-2026-007 with bank_loan mode during UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: G.2.1 terminology rename fully tested. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_deals_g21.py covers: new terminology accepted (bank_loan/own_funds/combined), old terminology rejected (with_bank/without_bank returns 422), bucket=own works (bucket=non_bank returns 422), suggest-distribution auto-fill, own_stages key in PUT, percent recomputation from amount, quote→deal conversion. Frontend verified: all new testids present, no old testids, correct Bulgarian labels, schedule without editable % column, auto-generate with correct stage counts. Fixed bug in AdminDeals.jsx progress bar calculation.
verified_features: Backend: POST /api/deals with payment_mode='bank_loan' or 'own_funds' or 'combined' accepted
Backend: New deal payment_mode contains: mode, bank_amount, own_amount, bank_invoice_amount, bank_proforma_amount, own_invoice_amount, own_proforma_amount
Backend: PUT /api/deals/{id} accepts own_stages key (not non_bank_stages)
Backend: POST /api/deals/{id}/regenerate-schedule with bucket=own works (bucket=non_bank returns 422)
Backend: POST /api/deals/{id}/suggest-distribution returns correct auto-fill values
Backend: Migration ran on boot (rename_payment_terminology) — idempotent
Backend: Quote→Deal converter creates deal with payment_mode='own_funds', schedule imported into own_stages
Frontend: AdminDeals shows 'Банков кредит' / 'Лични средства' / 'Комбиниран' in payment_mode column
Frontend: DealEditor radio buttons (data-testid: pm-radio-bank_loan, pm-radio-own_funds, pm-radio-combined)
Frontend: PaymentModeSection — 'Банков кредит' mode shows pm-bank-section, 'Лични средства' shows pm-own-section, 'Комбиниран' shows BOTH + pm-combined-breakdown
Frontend: pm-totals-summary section shows ПО ФАКТУРА / ПО ПРОФОРМА / ОБЩО
Frontend: ScheduleSection renamed sections: 'Вноски — Лични средства' (own bucket) and 'Вноски — Банков кредит' (bank bucket)
Frontend: ScheduleSection has NO editable % column — only Сума column with info text '(X% от basis)'
Frontend: Schedule auto-генерирай creates 8 stages for own bucket (preset=standard), 4 stages for bank bucket (preset=with_bank)
Frontend: NewDealWizard step 2 radio uses bank_loan/own_funds/combined values (data-testid wizard-pm-bank_loan etc.)

bugs_fixed.issue: Used 'd.non_bank_stages' instead of 'd.own_stages' for progress bar calculation
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to 'd.own_stages' to match new terminology
